SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-beth wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal.
Appellant, Greg Noto, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Morgan Ric, appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. No exhibits are marked or retained.
(Appellant, Greg Noto signs Aug-08-08 stip and order, allowing a Judge Pro Tem to hear the case.)
10:55am
Matter is submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2008 Continued To Sep-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
10:18AM
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Morgan Richard, appears in Pro Per. No appearance by the Appellant, Greg Noto. Judge Myles notes that the appellant had filed an ex parte motion and a declaration, filed 7/31/08, that the Court had not granted or denied. Mr. Noto, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative to Judge Myle's questions. Based on the fact that the Court did not rule on the continuance request the Court, for good cause, continues the matter to 9/4/08, 9:00AM, Dept. 525. Clerk to give notice.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Judgment Entered
